qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: The grammar is A. LL(1) but not LR(1) B. LR(1) but not LL(1) C. Both LL(1) and LR(1) D. Neither LL(1) nor LR(1)

qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: Consider the grammar defined by the following production rules, with two operators and Which one of the following is TRUE? A. is left associative, while is right associative B. is right associative, while is left associative C. Both and are right associative D. Both and are left associative

qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: Which one of the following grammars is free from left recursion? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: A student wrote two context-free grammars G1 and G2 for generating a single C-like array declaration. The dimension of the array is at least one. For example, int a[10] [3]; The grammars use D as the start symbol, and use six terminal symbols int ; id [ ] num.
